title: Promptly Pan Seared Middle Eastern Lamb Kebabs
description: A quick and flavorful Middle Eastern dish featuring lamb kebabs, Dijon mustard, and a hint of spice, served in a Korean brass bowl. This halal-friendly recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together Dijon mustard, olive oil, garlic, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat and add 1 tablespoon of olive oil.
Add the lamb skewers to the skillet and cook for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked to an internal temperature of 145 degrees.
Transfer the cooked lamb skewers to a Korean brass bowl and garnish with chopped fresh parsley.
Optional: serve with a side of couscous or pita bread for a more filling meal.
